reason: Route the full desktop UI quality check.
Verify platform separation, ViewModel thinness, and file-size limits.
Verify Avalonia runtime pitfalls and clipboard/hotkey/manual Windows contracts.
Verify nullable, result ownership, and cross-seam type safety.
Verify deep configuration seams, tests, and Core isolation.
Verify AppConfig serialization and host-native publish gates.
Audit complete selection-to-restore data flow across all layers.
Check implementation against Win32 clipboard ownership and conservative all-or-nothing guarantees.
Check target verification, foreground failure, balanced input, and UIPI handling.
